name: domain

outputs.description: The name of the of the indicator. TC.Indicator.Type The type of the domain.
outputs.name: TC.Indicator.Name

outputs.description: The ID of the domain. TC.Indicator.Description The description of the domain.
outputs.name: TC.Indicator.ID

outputs.description: The owner of the domain. TC.Indicator.CreateDate date
outputs.name: TC.Indicator.Owner

outputs.description: TC.Indicator.LastModified date The last date on which the indicator of the domain was modified.
outputs.name: The date on which the indicator of the domain was created.

outputs.description: The threat rating of the domain. TC.Indicator.Confidence The confidence rating of the domain.
outputs.name: TC.Indicator.Rating

outputs.description: The active indicator (for domains only). DBotScore.Indicator The value assigned by DBot for the indicator.
outputs.name: TC.Indicator.WhoisActive

outputs.description: The type assigned by DBot for the indicator. DBotScore.Score The score assigned by DBot for the indicator.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Type

outputs.description: The vendor used to calculate the score. Domain.Name The name of the domain.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Vendor
